summary: Iteration 15: Frontend-only testing of 10 new UI bug fixes. All 10 features verified PASSING. Testing covered: search bar padding, TabPilot header color split, tour guide (18px heading + no emojis), mute/unmute icon persistence, new tab prepend at top, toast 3s timeout, note badge no hover duplication, stats strip 'Data collected', mock data in web preview, DomainView cursor-pointer.
passed_tests: Search bar pr-7 padding: input has paddingLeft=28px, paddingRight=28px, full text preserved
TabPilot header color: 'Tab' renders rgb(201,209,217) (foreground), 'Pilot' renders rgb(87,165,255) (primary/blue)
Tour heading 18px: h3.text-[18px] confirmed via getComputedStyle fontSize=18px
Tour no emojis: emoji codepoint scan returns NO_EMOJI for all tour card content
Mute/Unmute persistence: After mute+unmute cycle on YouTube (tab 201), mute button remains visible (opacity=1, display=block)
New tab at TOP: window-add-tab-1 creates tab-item-400 ('New Tab') prepended before tab-item-101 (GitHub)
Toast 3s duration: toast visible immediately after tab close, gone after 3.2s (count=0)
Note badge no duplication: tab-102 has note-badge-102 present, tab-note-btn-102 NOT in DOM (guarded by !hasNote)
DomainView cursor-pointer: domain tab close buttons have computed cursor='pointer'
Stats strip 'Data collected': stats-strip innerText contains '0 / Data collected'
Web preview mock data: 11 tab items loaded via useMockTabs.js (not empty)
TabPilot text color split confirmed in both Sidebar header AND LandingPage hero section

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 10 UI bug fix features verified working

seed_data_creation: N/A - Using existing mock data via useMockTabs.js (INITIAL_TAB_NOTES: tabs 102, 103, 201 have notes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 all 10 UI fixes verified. Key implementation details: (1) SearchBar.jsx line 76 has 'pr-7' class (28px right padding), (2) Sidebar.jsx line 299 splits Tab/Pilot in separate spans with text-foreground/text-primary, (3) TabItem.jsx line 137 guards note hover button with !hasNote, (4) useMockTabs.js muteTab saves wasAudible and restores on unmute + audible=wasAudible??false, (5) createTabInWindow/createNewTab both use [newTab, ...existingTabs.map(t=>active:false)] prepend pattern, (6) TabPilotPreview.jsx Toaster has toastOptions duration:3000, (7) TourGuide.jsx STEPS array has no icon field, h3 has text-[18px], (8) StatsStrip has '0' + 'Data collected' label, (9) DomainView DomainTabItem close button has cursor-pointer class. All Chrome API console errors in web preview are expected/acceptable (useChromeTabs returns empty state).

mocked_integrations.Chrome tabs API: Web preview uses mock data via useMockTabs.js - useChromeTabs returns empty state (isExtensionContext=false)
mocked_integrations.All tab/window data: MOCKED via MOCK_WINDOWS in mockData.js, INITIAL_TAB_NOTES for note data

features_verified.1_search_bar_full_text: PASS - pr-7 padding (28px), full multi-word text preserved in input value
features_verified.2_tabpilot_color_split: PASS - Tab=rgb(201,209,217) foreground, Pilot=rgb(87,165,255) primary blue
features_verified.3_note_hover_no_duplication: PASS - hasBadge=true, hasBtn=false for tab with existing note
features_verified.4_mute_unmute_persistence: PASS - Volume icon visible (opacity=1) after unmute cycle
features_verified.5_new_tab_at_top: PASS - tab-item-400 New Tab prepended before existing tabs
features_verified.8_stats_data_collected: PASS - '0 / Data collected' in stats strip text
